messages.title: Recent Updates
messages.body:
You might have noticed a flurry of updates recently. While I typically prefer to bundle improvements into a larger monthly release, a few critical bugs popped up that I wanted to squash immediately so you wouldn't have to wait for a fix.

Things are smoothed out now, and we will be returning to our regular update cadence moving forward. Thank you so much for your patience and for continuing to use the software!

messages.title: Letterboxd Rate Limiting
messages.body: We've recently had an issue with Letterboxd implementing aggressive rate limiting which caused the Unfollower Finder to stop working. This has been resolved after 2 days and hopefully it was a one off anomaly. Please limit your scans to one or two a day to avoid further issues.
